2 ?0 + ?6 = ?06

Matching
2 ?06 1011100101 6
3 ?17 0111011111 8

Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch
2 C 2n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 1000101111 6 mismatch
2 I 0n 0111010000 4 mismatch

Unary 6
2 I 6 0011001010 4 mismatch
2 I 6n 1100110101 6 mismatch

Binary 06
2 AND 06 0000001010 2 mismatch
2 AND 06n 1111110101 8 mismatch
2 OR 06 1011101111 8 mismatch
2 OR 06n 0100010000 2 mismatch
2 XOR 06 1011100101 6 match 1/2
3 XOR 17 0111011111 8 match 2/2
all match XOR 06 17
2 XOR 06n 0100011010 4 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 06 1000100101 4 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 06n 0111011010 6 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 06 1100111111 8 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 06n 0011000000 2 mismatch

1 I 5

7 I 5

Extending defaults
2 1011100101 6
3 0111011111 8
Starting at I 5 increasing
I 6 0011001010 partial 0111010000 4
I 7 1001111011 partial 0001011011 5
left 9
Starting at I 2 decreasing
I 1 1110100100 partial 0110000100 3
I 0 1000101111 partial 1100110101 6
right 9
Choosing left
2 I 6
3 I 7

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 XOR 06
3 XOR 17
4 I 2
5 I 3
6 I 4
7 I 5

Applying to 11001001
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 4 = 1
1 I 5 = 0
2 XOR 06 = XOR(I 0,I 6) = XOR(1,0) = 1
3 XOR 17 = XOR(I 1,I 7) = XOR(1,1) = 0
4 I 2 = 0
5 I 3 = 0
6 I 4 = 1
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{10100010}
